A. The system exhibits several issues, including ignoring other agents' suggestions (repeatedly prompting for a solution despite being told it's unsolvable), action-reasoning mismatches (proposing simplified implementations instead of addressing the core issue), task derailment (proposing irrelevant code), premature termination (failing a task due to an invalid token), and weak verification (failing to identify errors in generated code). There are also instances of step repetition and disobeying task specifications.
